shortDesc_en: A stable, medical-grade antioxidant for brighter, protected skin.
shortDesc_el: A stable, medical-grade antioxidant for brighter, protected skin.
longDesc_en: A stable 15% vitamin C serum that brightens, protects against daily damage and supports collagen. Layer under SPF each morning.
longDesc_el: A stable 15% vitamin C serum that brightens, protects against daily damage and supports collagen. Layer under SPF each morning.

shortDesc_en: Daily broad-spectrum protection that wears beautifully under makeup.
shortDesc_el: Daily broad-spectrum protection that wears beautifully under makeup.
longDesc_en: A weightless broad-spectrum SPF 50 that protects without the white cast or grease. The single most effective anti-ageing step.
longDesc_el: A weightless broad-spectrum SPF 50 that protects without the white cast or grease. The single most effective anti-ageing step.

shortDesc_en: A gentle, effective retinoid for smoother texture over time.
shortDesc_el: A gentle, effective retinoid for smoother texture over time.
longDesc_en: A buffered retinaldehyde serum that smooths texture and tone with far less irritation than retinol. Build up slowly.
longDesc_el: A buffered retinaldehyde serum that smooths texture and tone with far less irritation than retinol. Build up slowly.

shortDesc_en: A pH-balanced cleanser that respects the skin barrier.
shortDesc_el: A pH-balanced cleanser that respects the skin barrier.
longDesc_en: A soothing, pH-balanced cleanser that removes the day without stripping. Suitable for sensitive and post-treatment skin.
longDesc_el: A soothing, pH-balanced cleanser that removes the day without stripping. Suitable for sensitive and post-treatment skin.

shortDesc_en: Ceramide-rich moisture for compromised or post-treatment skin.
shortDesc_el: Ceramide-rich moisture for compromised or post-treatment skin.
longDesc_en: A ceramide and squalane cream that rebuilds a compromised barrier. The cream we send every patient home with.
longDesc_el: A ceramide and squalane cream that rebuilds a compromised barrier. The cream we send every patient home with.

shortDesc_en: Let them choose. Redeemable on any product or treatment.
shortDesc_el: Let them choose. Redeemable on any product or treatment.
longDesc_en: A Lumea gift card, redeemable against any product or treatment. The easiest gift for someone who looks after their skin.
